rationale.R1.2: Identifies and addresses the internal contradiction regarding protocol mismatch handling.
rationale.R1.4: Names prior work (Lagrangian relaxation) but doesn't clearly articulate the delta of this approach.
rationale.R1.6: Improves clarity and flow, removes unsupported claims.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty about online recalibration implementation.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope, but the rewrite focuses on a specific aspect (protocol mismatch) rather than covering all dimensions mentioned in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Does not provide traceability for changes made.
